title: Is This Mod Legit?
description: Checks if your mods have been tampered with, using Modrinth's API.
body:
# Is This Mod Legit?

This mod has been replaced with a more secure web app over at [isthismodlegit.anopensauce.dev](https://isthismodlegit.anopensauce.dev/)!

**Is This Mod Legit?** Is a mod that scans your mods folder, and checks them against Modrinth to verify if they have been tampered with or not. This can be useful when identifying if a mod in your modpack is from a trustworthy source or not. **This mod works for up to 300 individual `.jar` files.** (past that, modrinth will stop checking the files.)

Supports 1.18.2 and onward, and works on both the client and server! Requires an internet connection to function every time you add/remove a mod.

Detailed explanation over at [GitHub](https://github.com/AnOpenSauceDev/IsThisModLegit)
